content.name: Satellite Mk3
content.author: Hary
content.description:
SATELLITE MK3
Adds a new advanced deployable satellite with a 300 km sensor range. Produce and deploy like other satellites.
:: FEATURES :: • New Satellite Mk3 ware • Blueprint for building it • 300 km radar/sensor range for wider coverage • 10,000 hull for better survivability • Balanced price and production costs
:: GENERAL OTHER STUFF :: • Standalone extension, no vanilla edits • Designed for late‑game map coverage with fewer satellites
:: INFO :: • Savegame will require the Extension once saved with it
:: KNOWN ISSUES :: • None known at this time
:: CREDITS :: ♦ Hary74656 (Nexusmods)/Hary (Steam)
